arts.ttl: Liverpool expected to sign two new players as huge weakness identified in Carabao Cup final loss
arts.sum: Reds’ glaring transfer need made abundantly clear during difficult week that also saw the end of their Champions League hopes

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hits back at Newcastle theory in damning verdict on Liverpool heartbreak
arts.sum: Arne Slot believed his rival Eddie Howe got things right by using his team’s power in the air, with Newcastle getting the better of Liverpool to win the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe: Carabao Cup win can be turning point for Newcastle United
arts.sum: Eddie Howe believes winning the Carabao Cup can be a “turning point” in the history of Newcastle United. Dan Burn and Alexander Isak scored either side of the interval to give the Magpies a deserved two-goal lead, before Federico Chiesa pulled one back in stoppage time. But the Tyneside outfit held on to claim their […] The post Eddie Howe: Carabao Cup win can be turning point for Newcastle United first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Newcastle end their wait for a trophy with Wembley win over Liverpool
arts.sum: The Magpies had not won a domestic cup since 1955.
